title: A Girl Like Me
notes: Pressed on two black 180 gram discs, Made in Canada sticker. Includes track information insert.

videos.title: Rihanna- Who Ya Gonna Run To? (2006)
videos.description: This song (written by Carl Sturken, Evan Rogers & Robyn Fenty) was released on Japanese Editions of her 2nd album: "A Girl Like Me" (track 14) :)

videos.title: Rihanna- Coulda Been The One (2006)
videos.description: This song (written by Carl Sturken & Evan Rogers) was released on Japanese Editions of her 2nd album: "A Girl Like Me" (track 16) :)

videos.title: Rihanna- Hypnotized (2005)
videos.description: This song (written by Carl Sturken, Evan Rogers & Robyn Fenty) was released on Japanese Editions of her debut album: "Music Of The Sun" (track 15) :)

videos.title: Rihanna   A Girl Like Me Album Comercial
videos.description: A Girl Like Me is the second studio album by singer Rihanna. It was released by Def Jam Recordings on April 19, 2006 in Japan, on April 24 in the UK and April 25 in the United States.
